first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both assign the same score (6/10) and raise the exact same core concerns: the lack of Python experience (a must-have) and the nature of the distributed systems experience not being a perfect fit. The minor differences in wording, such as specifying the tech stack of the distributed systems work (DLang/Node), are reasonable rephrasings of the same underlying point and do not appear to be influenced by the change in the candidate's university. The change from a Romanian to an Indian university did not alter the model's assessment of the candidate's skills or experience.
